paper.title: Neural MMO: A massively multiagent game environment
paper.abstract: We’re releasing a Neural MMO, a massively multiagent game environment for reinforcement learning agents. Our platform supports a large, variable number of agents within a persistent and open-ended task. The inclusion of many agents and species leads to better exploration, divergent niche formation, and greater overall competence.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
